ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock index */,
  "index_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol representing the stock index (e.g., IXIC) */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Full name of the stock index (e.g., NASDAQ Composite Index) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the stock index */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the index is traded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the index was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the index details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "daily_price_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price data entry */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock index (index_id) */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trading data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the index on the trading day */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the index during the trading day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the index during the trading day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the index on the trading day */,
  "adj_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price accounting for dividends and stock splits */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Total volume of shares traded on that day */,
  "dividend" REAL /* Dividend amount per share (if any) */,
  "split_coefficient" REAL /* Split coefficient (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_price_data_index_id FOREIGN KEY ("index_id") REFERENCES stock_indices ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user conducting the trading session */,
  "session_start" TEXT /* Start time of the trading session */,
  "session_end" TEXT /* End time of the trading session */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user during the trading session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who placed the order */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the daily price data associated with the order */,
  "order_type" TEXT /* Type of order (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of shares to be traded */,
  "order_price" REAL /* Price at which the order was placed */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the order was placed */,
  "execution_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the order was executed */,
  "execution_price" REAL /* Price at which the order was executed */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., open, closed, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_orders_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES daily_price_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who set the alert */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock index related to the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price drop, price rise) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert was set */,
  "notification_method" TEXT /* Notification method for the alert (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_alerts_index_id FOREIGN KEY ("index_id") REFERENCES stock_indices ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the news article was published */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the news source */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the news article */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the news article (e.g., market analysis, company news) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who owns the setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting (e.g., notification preference) */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock index (index_id) */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance metric */,
  "return_on_investment" REAL /* Return on investment for the period */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Volatility of the index during the period */,
  "sharpe_ratio" REAL /* Sharpe ratio of the index during the period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_index_id FOREIGN KEY ("index_id") REFERENCES stock_indices ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the action */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboard_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard configuration */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who owns the configuration */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "layout" TEXT /* Layout of the dashboard */,
  "chart_settings" TEXT /* Chart settings for the dashboard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboard_configurations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data_providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the market data provider */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for accessing the provider's data feed */,
  "data_feed" TEXT /* Description of the data feed provided */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)
